context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the triage-bug instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when a bug report exists but the right reproduction path and fix sequence are not yet clear.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Core principle:** Do not guess at fixes. Reproduce the bug, choose the right failing spec, then plan the smallest safe repair.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define the smallest fix path:** Name the likely files and the narrowest behavior change that should make the spec pass.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Fix path:  Orders::CreateOrder should return { success: false, error: "Out of stock" }

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run it before implementing the fix: `bundle exec rspec spec/requests/orders/create_spec.rb`
